summary: Add a defensive guard or comment to prevent IndexError when accessing ar_output.outputs[0] in the new single-path code.
Remove the dead requires_multimodal_data parameter or implement the gate to avoid unconditional forwarding, matching other bridges.
Confirm a clean GPU-gated CI run for test_image_to_image_alignment_online or add a lighter-weight integration test to catch diffusion list-prompt regressions from the return-type change.
